page_title: Financial Bank Accessibility Services in US

sections.title: Accessibility Services for Financial Banks  in the US
sections.description:
Accessibility Innovations helps banks and financial institutions across the United States create inclusive, compliant, and user-friendly banking experiences across digital platforms and physical environments. We focus on removing accessibility barriers so customers of all abilities can access financial services independently and with confidence.

Our expertise covers both regulatory compliance and real-world usability. From WCAG accessibility audits and ADA risk assessments to ATM accessibility evaluations and assistive technology testing, we help financial institutions identify gaps, reduce legal risk, and improve accessibility across online banking, mobile applications, and branch locations.

image.alt: A woman in a wheelchair talking with a receptionist at a modern office front desk, representing financial accessibility and inclusive customer service.

sections.description: We’ve partnered with national and regional banks, credit unions, and financial service providers across the U.S., helping them achieve compliance, enhance user experience, and build stronger customer trust. Accessibility Innovations is a trusted ally in creating inclusive and accessible financial ecosystems.

sections.title: Our Process for Creating Bank Services Accessible in the US ​

sections.description:
• Audit & Assessment: We evaluate your current digital and physical systems

  • Fix & Remediate: We correct barriers in websites, apps, documents, and more

  • Verify & Test: We retest and confirm compliance with real users and tools

  • Educate & Train: We equip your team with knowledge to stay accessible

  • Support & Sustain: We monitor changes and provide long-term partnership

items.question: What is an ADA consultant?
items.answer: An ADA consultant helps financial institutions interpret and apply ADA regulations to ensure accessibility compliance across digital and physical banking services.

items.question: What accessibility services do you provide for banks?
items.answer: We offer digital audits, PDF remediation, mobile testing, training, ATM evaluations, and long-term support for ongoing compliance.

items.question: Are your services compliant with accessibility regulations?
items.answer: Yes, all services follow WCAG 2.1, ADA, Section 508, and state-level guidelines as applicable.

items.question: Can you help make ATMs accessible?
items.answer: Yes. We assess ATMs for reachability, tactile feedback, speech output, and screen readability — and provide recommendations for remediation.

items.question: What are accessibility skills?
items.answer: Accessibility skills include knowledge of WCAG, testing with assistive technologies, accessible content creation, and inclusive design principles.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support after the initial remediation?
items.answer: Absolutely. We provide long-term monitoring, policy updates, and annual or on-demand audits to maintain compliance as technology evolves.

items.question: How can accessibility improve customer satisfaction?
items.answer: Accessible banking enables equal access to services, reducing frustration and improving loyalty among customers with disabilities and aging populations.
